member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative
member.summary: P/Invoke declarations for the libkazsign native library. KAZ-SIGN-256 is the Malaysian National Post-Quantum Signature Algorithm (Security Level 5).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.PublicKeySize
member.summary: Public key size for KAZ-SIGN-256 (comparable to ML-DSA-87)

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.KeyGen(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.param: Output buffer for public key (2592 bytes)
Output buffer for secret key (4896 bytes)
member.returns: KAZ_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.Sign(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.UIntPtr,System.Byte[],System.UIntPtr@)
member.param: Output buffer for signature (4627 bytes max)
member.returns: KAZ_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.Verify(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.UIntPtr,System.Byte[],System.UIntPtr)
member.returns: KAZ_SUCCESS if valid, KAZ_ERROR_INVALID_SIGNATURE if invalid

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignProvider
member.summary: Managed wrapper for KAZ-SIGN-256 native operations.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.CryptographicException
member.summary: Exception thrown when cryptographic operations fail.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.LibOqsCryptoProvider
member.summary: Crypto provider implementation using liboqs (Open Quantum Safe). This is a placeholder that will be implemented with actual liboqs bindings.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmProvider
member.summary: HSM provider implementation using SoftHSM2 via PKCS#11. Suitable for development and testing environments.

member.name: P:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmOptions.LibraryPath
member.summary: Path to the SoftHSM2 PKCS#11 library. Default paths: - Linux: /usr/lib/softhsm/libsofthsm2.so - macOS: /usr/local/lib/softhsm/libsofthsm2.so - Docker: /usr/lib/softhsm/libsofthsm2.so

member.name: P:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmOptions.TokenLabel
member.summary: Token label to use for operations. Must match the label used when initializing the token.

member.name: P:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmOptions.SoPin
member.summary: Security Officer PIN for the token (used for admin operations).
